bf_berserker_resolve.description:
获得6点格挡。
施加1层易伤。
bf_berserker_resolve.name: 狂战决心

bf_blood_bond.description:
每回合开始时，
若HP低于25%，
获得1点能量
和1点力量。
bf_blood_bond.name: 血之纽带

bf_blood_fang.description:
造成6点伤害2次。
每次未格挡的伤害
施加1层嗜血。

bf_blood_feast.description:
造成7点伤害。
若击杀目标，
获得3点最大HP。
消耗。
bf_blood_feast.name: 血宴

bf_blood_frenzy.description:
每回合开始时，
获得2点力量，
失去2点HP。
bf_blood_frenzy.name: 血之狂热

bf_blood_mirror.description:
失去3点HP。
对所有敌人
施加2层嗜血。
bf_blood_mirror.name: 血之镜像

bf_blood_offering.description:
失去5点HP。
获得2点能量。
抽2张牌。
消耗。
bf_blood_offering.name: 血祭

bf_blood_rage.description:
造成6点伤害。
本回合每失去1次HP
额外攻击1次。
bf_blood_rage.name: 血怒

bf_blood_rush.description:
选择手中1张攻击牌
本场战斗降低1费。
消耗。
bf_blood_rush.name: 血涌

bf_blood_scent.description:
每当你施加
易伤，抽
1张牌。
bf_blood_scent.name: 血之气息

bf_blood_shell.description:
获得10点格挡。
本回合受击时，
对攻击者施加
1层嗜血。
bf_blood_shell.name: 血壳

bf_blood_wave.description:
对所有敌人
造成5点伤害。
施加1层易伤。
bf_blood_wave.name: 血浪

bf_blood_whirl.description:
失去2点HP。
对所有敌人
造成6点伤害。
施加1层嗜血。
bf_blood_whirl.name: 血旋

bf_bloodhound.description:
抽3张牌。
弃置抽到的
非攻击牌。
bf_bloodhound.name: 猎血犬

bf_bloodlust.description:
每当你失去HP，
获得1点力量。
bf_bloodlust.name: 嗜血

bf_bloodrage.description:
所有英雄失去2点HP。
对所有敌人施加
1层易伤。
获得2点临时力量。
bf_bloodrage.name: 嗜血狂怒

bf_crimson_slash.description:
失去2点HP。
造成10点伤害。
bf_crimson_slash.name: 绯红斩

bf_crushing_blow.description:
造成10点伤害。
消耗目标所有易伤；
每层+4伤害。
bf_crushing_blow.name: 碾压

bf_desperate_duel.description:
获得2点力量。
敌人获得1点力量。
造成6点伤害。
bf_desperate_duel.name: 拼死决斗

bf_execution.description:
造成8点伤害。
若造成伤害，
使目标嗜血翻倍。
bf_execution.name: 处决

bf_exploit.description:
造成3点伤害。
若目标有易伤，
抽1张牌。
bf_exploit.name: 痛击

bf_frenzy_claw.description:
随机对敌人
造成4点伤害3次。
bf_frenzy_claw.name: 狂乱之爪

bf_gore.description:
造成10点伤害。
施加2层易伤。
bf_gore.name: 穿刺

bf_hemophilia.description:
每当敌人受到
嗜血伤害，
治疗1点HP。
bf_hemophilia.name: 血友病

bf_leech.description:
造成6点伤害。
若造成伤害，
治疗2点HP。
bf_leech.name: 吸血

bf_pain_threshold.description:
每当你失去HP，
抽1张牌并
获得3点格挡。
bf_pain_threshold.name: 痛觉阈值

bf_predator_instinct.description:
本回合每打出
1张攻击牌，
获得2点格挡。
抽1张牌。
bf_predator_instinct.name: 掠食本能

bf_prey_on_weakness.description:
造成6点伤害。
若目标有易伤，
额外攻击1次。
bf_prey_on_weakness.name: 趁虚而入

bf_sacrifice.description:
失去3点HP。
获得2点能量。
bf_sacrifice.name: 献祭

bf_sanguine_aura.description:
每当你造成攻击
伤害，对目标
施加1层嗜血。
bf_sanguine_aura.name: 血气光环

bf_sanguine_shield.description:
失去2点HP。
获得11点格挡。
bf_sanguine_shield.name: 血盾

bf_savage_strike.description:
造成6点伤害。
本场战斗每失去
1点HP，+1伤害。
bf_savage_strike.name: 蛮击

bf_scarlet_chains.description:
每当你对敌人
施加嗜血，该敌人
获得1层虚弱。
bf_scarlet_chains.name: 猩红锁链

bf_siphon_life.description:
吸取敌人嗜血
层数等量的HP。
消耗所有嗜血。
bf_siphon_life.name: 虹吸生命

bf_survival_instinct.description:
获得3点格挡。
HP低于25%时，
改为获得6点。
bf_survival_instinct.name: 求生本能

bf_undying_will.description:
HP降为0时，
以1点HP存活。
（触发2次）
bf_undying_will.name: 不死意志

bf_vampiric_embrace.description:
对所有敌人
造成4点伤害。
治疗等量HP。
消耗。
bf_vampiric_embrace.name: 血族拥抱

bf_vital_guard.description:
获得6点格挡。
HP低于28%时，
额外获得6点。
bf_vital_guard.name: 命脉守护

fg_absorb_impact.description:
目标英雄获得
巨剑生命值的格挡。
巨剑失去所有生命，
本回合不能
再召唤巨剑。
fg_absorb_impact.name: 吸收冲击

fg_auto_forge.description:
每回合开始时，
铸造+4。
fg_auto_forge.name: 自动锻造

fg_barricade.description:
格挡不再在
回合开始时移除。
fg_barricade.name: 壁垒

fg_blade_storm.description:
对所有敌人造成
巨剑HP 50%的
伤害×3。消耗。
fg_blade_storm.name: 刃暴

fg_block_transfer.description:
将所有英雄格挡
转化为巨剑HP。
fg_block_transfer.name: 格挡转移

fg_bulwark_slam.description:
对所有敌人造成
等同于铸造者
格挡值的伤害。
消耗所有格挡。
fg_bulwark_slam.name: 壁垒猛击

fg_chain_forge.description:
铸造+4。
若本回合已铸造，
改为+8。
抽1张牌。
fg_chain_forge.name: 连锻

fg_counter_forge.description:
当巨剑被攻击时，
铸造+3。
fg_counter_forge.name: 反击锻造

fg_energy_reserve.description:
回合结束时，
未使用的能量
保留至下回合。
fg_energy_reserve.name: 能量储备

fg_eruption_strike.description:
造成15点伤害。
下回合+1能量。
铸造+4。
fg_eruption_strike.name: 爆裂打击

fg_forge_barrier.description:
获得等同于巨剑
HP的格挡。
fg_forge_barrier.name: 锻造屏障

fg_forge_master.description:
每次铸造时，
额外+2 HP。
fg_forge_master.name: 锻造大师

fg_forge_shield.description:
目标英雄获得
10点格挡。
下回合+2抽牌。
fg_forge_shield.name: 锻盾

fg_forge_slam.description:
巨剑对所有敌人
造成6点伤害。
巨剑获得未被
格挡的生命值。
fg_forge_slam.name: 锻击猛击

fg_greatsword_cleave.description:
对所有敌人造成
等同于巨剑
生命值的伤害。
fg_greatsword_cleave.name: 巨剑横扫

fg_hardened_blade.description:
造成8点伤害。
若巨剑存在，
获得4点格挡。
fg_hardened_blade.name: 硬化之刃

fg_impervious_wall.description:
巨剑获得20点
生命。消耗。
fg_impervious_wall.name: 不破之墙

fg_iron_skin.description:
每当巨剑受到伤害，
目标英雄获得
等量格挡。
fg_iron_skin.name: 铁甲之肤

fg_iron_will.description:
每回合开始时，
获得4点格挡。
fg_iron_will.name: 钢铁意志

fg_living_sword.description:
回合结束时，
巨剑对随机敌人
造成自身HP 50%
的伤害。

fg_magnetic_edge.description:
造成5点伤害。
铸造+4。
若巨剑HP≥20，
改为12点伤害。
fg_magnetic_edge.name: 磁刃

fg_melt_down.description:
消耗1张手牌。
巨剑获得其费用×6
的生命。
下回合+2抽牌。
fg_melt_down.name: 熔炼

fg_molten_core.description:
造成8点伤害2次。
铸造+6。
fg_molten_core.name: 熔核

fg_overcharge.description:
本回合巨剑
造成双倍伤害。
fg_overcharge.name: 超载

fg_reforged_edge.description:
造成7点伤害。
若本回合已铸造，
额外造成7点。
fg_reforged_edge.name: 重铸之锋

fg_reinforce.description:
巨剑获得等同于
其当前生命100%
的额外生命。
消耗。
fg_reinforce.name: 加固

fg_repurpose.description:
消耗1张手牌。
获得其费用×4格挡。
铸造+其费用×3。
fg_repurpose.name: 改造

fg_resonance.description:
每当目标英雄
获得格挡，
铸造：巨剑+2。
fg_resonance.name: 共鸣

fg_riposte_strike.description:
造成6点伤害。
额外造成所有英雄
+巨剑荆棘×2
的伤害。
fg_riposte_strike.name: 反击斩

fg_sacrifice_fuel.description:
消耗巨剑8点生命
或英雄8点格挡，
获得1点能量。
不足8则无法打出。
fg_sacrifice_fuel.name: 献燃

fg_salvage.description:
获得6点格挡。
从弃牌堆选择
1张牌置于
抽牌堆顶。
fg_salvage.name: 打捞

fg_shield_bash.description:
造成等同于铸造者
当前格挡值的伤害。
fg_shield_bash.name: 盾击

fg_sword_crash.description:
造成等同于巨剑
当前生命值的伤害。
fg_sword_crash.name: 剑崩

fg_sword_mastery.description:
每打出攻击牌，
铸造+2。
fg_sword_mastery.name: 剑术精通

fg_sword_sacrifice.description:
对所有敌人造成
10点伤害。
获得10点格挡。
消耗巨剑。
本回合不能召唤巨剑。
fg_sword_sacrifice.name: 剑之牺牲

fg_sword_ward.description:
若巨剑存在，
每回合开始时
获得3点格挡。
fg_sword_ward.name: 剑之守护

fg_temper.description:
获得6点格挡。
下回合获得6点
格挡。
fg_temper.name: 回火

fg_tempered_strike.description:
造成6点伤害。
获得6点格挡。
fg_tempered_strike.name: 淬炼打击

fg_thorn_aura.description:
获得3层荆棘。
巨剑获得3层荆棘。
fg_thorn_aura.name: 荆棘光环

fg_thorn_burst.description:
对所有敌人造成
6点伤害，额外造成
所有英雄和巨剑
荆棘总和×2伤害。
移除所有荆棘。
fg_thorn_burst.name: 荆棘爆发

fg_thorn_forge.description:
铸造2。巨剑获得
4层荆棘(本回合)。
fg_thorn_forge.name: 荆棘锻造

fm_blood_pact.description:
消耗1张手牌。
抽2张牌。
fm_blood_pact.name: 血契

fm_bloodbath.description:
消耗1张手牌。
施加2层嗜血
和1层易伤。
fm_bloodbath.name: 血浴

fm_crimson_pact.description:
每当一张牌被
消耗，对随机
敌人造成5点伤害。
fm_crimson_pact.name: 绯红契约

fm_flesh_rend.description:
消耗1张手牌。
造成其费用×8
点伤害。
fm_flesh_rend.name: 撕裂血肉

fm_relentless.description:
造成6点伤害。
本回合每消耗1张牌
额外攻击1次。
fm_relentless.name: 不屈

fm_soul_harvest.description:
消耗手中所有
其他手牌。
每消耗1张，
造成7点伤害。
fm_soul_harvest.name: 灵魂收割

fm_undying_rage.description:
每当一张牌被
消耗，获得
1点力量。
fm_undying_rage.name: 不灭之怒

ic_anger.description:
Deal 6 damage.
Add a copy to
your discard pile.
ic_anger.name: Anger

ic_barricade.description:
Block is not removed
at the start of
your turn.
ic_barricade.name: Barricade

ic_berserk.description:
Gain 1 Vulnerable.
At the start of each
turn, gain 1 Energy.
ic_berserk.name: Berserk

ic_blood_for_blood.description:
Costs 1 less for each
time you lose HP this
combat. Deal 18 dmg.
ic_blood_for_blood.name: Blood for Blood

ic_body_slam.description:
Deal damage equal
to your Block.
ic_body_slam.name: Body Slam

ic_brutality.description:
At the start of your
turn, lose 1 HP and
draw 1 card.
ic_brutality.name: Brutality

ic_clash.description:
Can only be played if
every card in hand
is an Attack.
Deal 14 damage.
ic_clash.name: Clash

ic_combust.description:
At the end of your
turn, lose 1 HP and
deal 5 damage to ALL
enemies.
ic_combust.name: Combust

ic_corruption.description:
Skills cost 0.
Whenever you play a
Skill, Exhaust it.
ic_corruption.name: Corruption

ic_dark_embrace.description:
Whenever a card is
Exhausted, draw 1.
ic_dark_embrace.name: Dark Embrace

ic_demon_form.description:
At the start of
each turn, gain 2
Strength.
ic_demon_form.name: Demon Form

ic_double_tap.description:
This turn, your next
Attack is played twice.
ic_double_tap.name: Double Tap

ic_dropkick.description:
Deal 5 damage.
If enemy is Vulnerable:
gain 1 Energy, draw 1.
ic_dropkick.name: Dropkick

ic_dual_wield.description:
Copy an Attack or
Power card in hand.
ic_dual_wield.name: Dual Wield

ic_evolve.description:
Whenever you draw a
Status card, draw 1.
ic_evolve.name: Evolve

ic_exhume.description:
Put a card from your
exhaust pile into
your hand. Exhaust.
ic_exhume.name: Exhume

ic_feed.description:
Deal 10 damage.
If this kills, gain
3 Max HP. Exhaust.
ic_feed.name: Feed

ic_feel_no_pain.description:
Whenever a card is
Exhausted, gain
3 Block.
ic_feel_no_pain.name: Feel No Pain

ic_fiend_fire.description:
Exhaust your hand.
Deal 7 damage for
each card exhausted.
ic_fiend_fire.name: Fiend Fire

ic_fire_breathing.description:
Whenever you draw a
Status or Curse, deal
6 damage to ALL.
ic_fire_breathing.name: Fire Breathing

ic_flame_barrier.description:
Gain 12 Block.
When attacked this turn,
deal 4 damage back.
ic_flame_barrier.name: Flame Barrier

ic_flex.description:
Gain 2 Strength.
At end of turn,
lose 2 Strength.
ic_flex.name: Flex

ic_havoc.description:
Play the top card of
your draw pile and
Exhaust it.
ic_havoc.name: Havoc

ic_immolate.description:
Deal 21 damage to
ALL enemies.
Add a Burn to discard.
ic_immolate.name: Immolate

ic_infernal_blade.description:
Add a random Attack
to your hand. It
costs 0. Exhaust.
ic_infernal_blade.name: Infernal Blade

ic_intimidate.description:
Apply 1 Weak to
ALL enemies. Exhaust.
ic_intimidate.name: Intimidate

ic_juggernaut.description:
Whenever you gain
Block, deal 5 damage
to a random enemy.
ic_juggernaut.name: Juggernaut

ic_metallicize.description:
At the end of your
turn, gain 3 Block.
ic_metallicize.name: Metallicize

ic_offering.description:
Lose 6 HP.
Gain 2 Energy.
Draw 3 cards.
Exhaust.
ic_offering.name: Offering

ic_perfected_strike.description:
Deal 6 damage. Deals
2 additional damage
for each "Strike" card
in your deck.
ic_perfected_strike.name: Perfected Strike

ic_power_through.description:
Gain 15 Block.
Add 2 Wounds to
your hand.
ic_power_through.name: Power Through

ic_rage.description:
Whenever you play an
Attack this turn,
gain 3 Block.
ic_rage.name: Rage

ic_rampage.description:
Deal 8 damage.
Increases by 5
each time played.
ic_rampage.name: Rampage

ic_reaper.description:
Deal 4 damage to
ALL enemies.
Heal for unblocked damage.
ic_reaper.name: Reaper

ic_reckless_charge.description:
Deal 7 damage.
Shuffle a Dazed into
your draw pile.
ic_reckless_charge.name: Reckless Charge

ic_rupture.description:
Whenever you lose HP
from a card, gain
1 Strength.
ic_rupture.name: Rupture

ic_second_wind.description:
Exhaust all non-Attack
cards in hand. Gain
5 Block for each.
ic_second_wind.name: Second Wind

ic_sentinel.description:
Gain 5 Block.
If this card is
Exhausted, gain
2 Energy.
ic_sentinel.name: Sentinel

ic_sever_soul.description:
Exhaust all non-Attack
cards in hand.
Deal 16 damage.
ic_sever_soul.name: Sever Soul

ic_shockwave.description:
Apply 3 Weak and
3 Vulnerable to
ALL enemies. Exhaust.
ic_shockwave.name: Shockwave

ic_spot_weakness.description:
If the enemy intends
to attack, all heroes
gain 3 Strength.
ic_spot_weakness.name: Spot Weakness

ic_sword_boomerang.description:
Deal 3 damage to a
random enemy 3 times.
ic_sword_boomerang.name: Sword Boomerang

ic_thunderclap.description:
Deal 4 damage to
ALL enemies.
Apply 1 Vulnerable.
ic_thunderclap.name: Thunderclap

ic_true_grit.description:
Gain 7 Block.
Exhaust a random
card in your hand.
ic_true_grit.name: True Grit

ic_uppercut.description:
Deal 13 damage.
Apply 1 Weak.
Apply 1 Vulnerable.
ic_uppercut.name: Uppercut

ic_whirlwind.description:
Deal 5 damage to ALL
enemies X times.
(X = current Energy)
ic_whirlwind.name: Whirlwind

ic_wild_strike.description:
Deal 12 damage.
Shuffle a Wound into
your draw pile.
ic_wild_strike.name: Wild Strike

nw_all_in.description:
Consume all Energy.
Draw 2 cards per
Energy consumed.
Exhaust.
nw_all_in.name: All In

nw_blood_fury.description:
Whenever you lose HP
from a card, your
next Attack deals
double damage.
nw_blood_fury.name: Blood Fury

nw_echo_slash.description:
Deal 5 damage.
Hit once more for
each Attack played
this turn.
nw_echo_slash.name: Echo Slash

nw_gamblers_blade.description:
Deal damage equal to
hand size × 3.
Discard 1 card.
nw_gamblers_blade.name: Gambler's Blade

nw_poison_shield.description:
Gain Block equal to
total Poison on all
enemies.
nw_poison_shield.name: Poison Shield

nw_psi_surge.description:
Whenever you draw 3+
cards in a single
action, gain 1 Energy.
nw_psi_surge.name: Psi Surge

nw_tactical_retreat.description:
Gain 6 Block.
Draw 2 cards.
Discard 1 card.
nw_tactical_retreat.name: Tactical Retreat

nw_toxic_storm.description:
Deal 3 damage to ALL
enemies X times.
Apply 1 Poison each
hit.
nw_toxic_storm.name: Toxic Storm

nw_venomous_might.description:
At the start of each
turn, gain Strength
equal to total enemy
Poison ÷ 4.
nw_venomous_might.name: Venomous Might

si_a_thousand_cuts.description:
Whenever you play a
card, deal 1 damage
to ALL enemies.
si_a_thousand_cuts.name: A Thousand Cuts

si_after_image.description:
Whenever you play a
card, gain 1 Block.
si_after_image.name: After Image

si_blur.description:
Gain 5 Block.
Block not removed
next turn.
si_blur.name: Blur

si_bullet_time.description:
Cards cost 0 this
turn. No draw
next turn.
si_bullet_time.name: Bullet Time

si_calculated_gamble.description:
Discard your hand.
Draw that many cards.
si_calculated_gamble.name: Calculated Gamble

si_choke.description:
Deal 12 damage.
Whenever enemy plays
a card, take 3 damage.
si_choke.name: Choke

si_cloak_and_dagger.description:
Gain 6 Block.
